description: Agent-emission Tier-1 phase-completion envelope. Wrapped by Tier-2 PhaseCompletionEnvelopeSchema for cluster ingestion. Crypto-bearing: validate() requires { acceptDeferred: true } to receive shape-only valid:true.

envelope_kind.description: Discriminator literal pinning the Tier-1 shape. The Tier-2 wrapper uses the literal "phase_completion".

contract_version.description: Hounfour contract version this envelope was authored against. Pinned to "8.6.0" for the cycle-005 ship line.

agent_id.description: Stable agent identifier (consumer-shaped — hounfour does not freeze the namespace).

agent_signature.description: Ed25519 signature value (unpadded base64url, 86 chars after the "ed25519:" prefix) over the RFC 8785 canonical-JSON of all-other-fields. Hounfour does NOT verify; consumer-side verification is required per NF-1.

agent_key_pubkey.description: Ed25519 public key identifier of the signer (32-byte key → 43 unpadded base64url chars per RFC 4648 §5).

payload.description: Consumer-shaped payload (phase outcomes, gate decisions, attestations). Hounfour does NOT freeze the sub-shape per ADR-010 — class-vs-policy boundary.

nonce.description: 128-bit nonce as 22-char unpadded base64url. Used by the FR-C1 replay-detection builtin (`nonce_unique_per_signer_window`) with a 5-minute sliding window per signer.

sequence.description: String-encoded ≥0 integer (CT-03; consumer parses to BigInt post-validation). Monotonically increasing per (signer, key_version) tuple per FR-C2.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at agent emission (Z suffix; non-UTC offsets NOT accepted per cross-runner serialization variance).
